nasb.text: And they stirred up the people, the elders and the scribes, and they came up to him and dragged him away and brought him before the Council.

esv.text: And they stirred up the people and the elders and the scribes, and they came upon him and seized him and brought him before the council,

cnv.text: 又煽動民眾、長老、經學家，這些人就來捉拿他，把他帶到公議會，

ccb.text: 又煽动百姓、长老和律法教师抓住司提凡，把他押到公会。

csbs.text: 他们又煽动民众、长老和经文士们就忽然来抓住司提反，把他带到议会，
